string 2:
I came here to see Lord Neptunemon's Blue Digizoid armor,
but...
...I am unsure of how to talk to Lord Neptunemon about it.

We would be talking about an extremely rare material. I do
not want to seem suspicious.
{next}I'll mention you to Neptunemon.
{next}You wanna just sneak in?
{end}Let's talk again later.

Would you do that for me? I am sure that will make it go
much smoother!

My body stands out, so I could not "sneak in"... No! I do
not want to be suspicious!
Ah, you are busy. I apologize. I shall see you later.

I am sorry to ask this of you, but please talk to Lord
Neptunemon for me.
Let us go right away!
Good to see ya. Me doin' good and feelin' at home here now.
Thank you for coming all this way. Is anything wrong?

I hope you will forgive me for such a sudden visit. To get
right to it, I...

...Understood, UlforceVeedramon. So you want to repair your
armor, do you?
Yes, just as you said, my armor is made of Blue Digizoid.
How do you usually repair your armor?

It is seldom damaged, but if need be, I have access to a
vein of Chrondigizoit ore.
And that is thanks to JumboGamemon over there.
Hehehe. Me found vein of ore!
Could you possibly spare some, then?!
I wish I could say, "Of course," but...

...even though I have enough for now, Chrondigizoit ore is
still a very rare material.
I cannot hand it out to just anyone.
I see. So I must show you that I am worthy?
Exactly. Think of it as a battle ritual to prove yourself.

However, the ocean is my arena. If we fight here, I would
have too much of an advantage.
I would not mind. I am the one asking for a favor.

This must be fair. I cannot measure your true strength
without a level playing field.
That is true...

You there, one who saved the ocean... Why not join
UlforceVeedramon? You are partners, no?

Not exactly. I have asked this human to bring me here, but
it is really a personal matter.
I want to do this without the help of others.
{next}Let me fight alongside you.
{next}You should accept Neptunemon's terms.
{next}It's too late to turn back now.

Well... When I think it over rationally, I realize that
would be the best thing to do...

Hmm... Indeed, it is a condition offered by the opponent. It
may be rude to decline it...

I know how dependable you are. It is just a matter of my own
pride...
...but I suppose this is no time for such foolishness.

Understood. The two of us shall fight together. Lord
Neptunemon, is it agreed?
Of course. Shall we start the battle right away?
{next}Yes, right away.
{end}I need to get ready first.

All right, then. Let us begin. No need to go easy on me.
Come, now!
Very well. Let me know when you are ready, then.
Are you ready now?
{next}Yes, I'm ready.
{end}Not quite yet.

All right, then. Let us begin. No need to go easy on me.
Come, now!
Very well. Let me know when you are ready, then.
Neptunemon want ya to fight hard. Ya better be really ready!

You have certainly shown me what you are capable of and your
true feelings.

There is no dishonesty in your words. I can tell after
crossing swords with you.

As promised, I shall share the material to repair your
armor.
You will?! Thank you very much!

JumboGamemon, could you go to the Factorial Area and have
Chrondigizoit ore processed?
No problem! Me go to Factorial Area right away!

We can meet at Guardromon's place. You come after take
break.

All right. Let us get going, too! You will stick with me to
the end, right?
You are leaving so soon? I enjoyed fighting with you.

Actually, I have a favor to ask of you. It is about a
different matter...

You are going with UlforceVeedramon, no? When you are done
and have time, could you return?

I apologize, Lord Neptunemon, for taking this person away
from you for now...
Of course. Have a safe trip.
Me give Blue Chrondigizoit Metal to UlforceVeedramon just now.
Me happy! JumboGamemon useful!

Production is going smoothly, thanks to your assistance.
Now, what can I do for you?
I wanna repair Zudomon's hammer.
I need to fix Blimpmon.
{end}Nothing right now.

I just received the Blue Chrondigizoit Metal. Now I can 
repair my armor!

Honestly, without you, I might not have been able to show
Lord Neptunemon I was serious.

Here, take this. Consider it a reward! I shall head for
the rendezvous point now. So long!

By the way, I remember Lord Neptunemon saying something
about asking a favor of you...

Either way, I am sure you have a lot to do. I shall not
monopolize your time.
I shall be fine. Do not worry and go ahead. See you again!
